title: Calgary, AB — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Calgary is a city in AB with a population of 1,306,784. Canada’s energy capital with the highest household incomes, abundant sunshine, and easy access to the Rocky Mountains.
